case_title: ANOTHER CORPORATE ISO, LLC VS. LARA HANNA ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ANOTHER CORPORATE ISP, LLC RECOVER FROM APPELLANT HANNA, LARA AKA  LARA HANNAWI MARTIN, JAY CREELY, ELIZABETH $620.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00 SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ANOTHER CORPORATE ISO, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RUDY RUCKER, MANAGING MEMBER. DEFENDENT LARA HANNA IS NOT PRESENT AND PLAINTIFF DISMISSED HER WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDENT JAY MARTIN APPEARED FOR HIMSELF AND ON BEHALF OF HIS WIFE ELIZABETH CREELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
